long_description:
Enjoy Papa Gisueppi’s Rising Artisan Crust Deluxe Pizza! The unique dough is cooked for the first time in your oven, it bubbles and rises filling your kitchen with the aroma of freshly baked bread. Generously topped with Papa’s secret sauce, oozy mozzarella cheese, tasty pepperoni, capsicum, mushroom and red onion. Perfect to share with family and friends. Simply Delizioso!

  • Artisan crust, baked in your oven for the first time
  • Perfect for sharing and entertaining
  • Premium pizza toppings
  • Light & Airy Crust
  • 3 health star rating
  • No artificial colours
  • Try Pepperoni Pesto or Deluxe

 

Papa Giuseppi's believes pizza can be enjoyed in many different shapes and sizes. He makes sure the dough is light & airy, the crust is crunchy and it's loaded with his favourite pizza toppings. From Papa Giuseppi's oven to yours. Simply delizioso!
name: Rising Artisan Crust Deluxe Pizza

long_description:
At FroPro, we understand the irresistible appeal of delicious pizza, but also the need for healthier options. We are doing things differently with our FroPro High Protein Pizzas.
Its pizza with benefits! You're welcome.
  • Quick & Convenient: Cook from frozen in the air-fryer or oven.
  • High Protein: Fuel your entire day and stay fuller for longer, FroPro Pizzas are packed with high-quality protein.
  • 50% Less Carbs: FroPro Pizzas offer 50% less carbs in our faba bean high protein pizza base.
  • Excellent Source of Dietary Fibre: Each slice is rich in dietary fibre, supporting digestive health and overall well-being.
  • High Health Star Rating: FroPro offers a guilt free choice without compromising on flavour.
  • Proudly Australian: Made in Australia with local ingredients, FroPro Pizzas provide a delicious and nutritious way to treat yourself better!

We're helping Aussies eat better, one pizza at a time.
Make it Fit, make it FroPro!

long_description:
Enjoy Papa Gisueppi’s Rising Artisan Crust Pepperoni Pesto Pizza! The unique dough is cooked for the first time in your oven, it bubbles and rises filling your kitchen with the aroma of freshly baked bread. Generously topped with Papa’s secret sauce, oozy mozzarella cheese, tasty pepperoni and finished with dollops of pesto. Perfect to share with family and friends. Simply Delizioso!

 

  • Artisan crust, baked in your oven for the first time
  • Perfect for sharing and entertaining
  • Premium pizza toppings
  • Light & airy crust
  • 3 Health star rating
  • No artificial colours
  • Try Pepperoni Pesto or Deluxe

 

Papa Giuseppi's believes pizza can be enjoyed in many different shapes and sizes. He makes sure the dough is light & airy, the crust is crunchy and it's loaded with his favourite pizza toppings. From Papa Giuseppi's oven to yours. Simply delizioso!
name: Rising Artisan Crust Pepperoni Pesto Pizza

long_description:
The Handmade Food Co. Croque Monsieur Toastie with Ham and Cheese — Ham and tasty cheese on soft white toasted bread topped with a special cheesy sauce.

  • French-inspired, Aussie-made — A rich, golden cheese and ham topped toastie reimagined for Aussies
  • Ready in minutes — A hearty snack that can be quickly prepared in an air fryer or a sandwich press after a speedy microwave
  • Crafted with care — Quality ham, tasty cheese, and a signature cheesy sauce on soft white bread

But what is a Croque Monsieur Toastie though we hear you ask?
Don't worry, you aren't the only one asking just that question! The croque monsieur originated in French cafes and bars over 100 years ago. It is a golden toasted sandwich with a cheesy topper, filled with delicious ingredients and more melted cheese inside. They are a warming, rich and irresistibly satisfying meal or snack. The Handmade Food Co is one of the few companies to reimagine this hearty snack for Aussies and we're keeping it simple for you, ready in minutes once it's removed from the freezer.

At the Handmade Food Co. we are passionate about creating great tasting handcrafted food. Proudly Australian and family owned, we take great pride in using only the best and freshest ingredients to make good honest food.
name: Croque Monsieur Ham & Cheese Toastie

long_description: Beef meatballs with penne and tomato sauce is a classic Italian-style dish loved by many. This hearty, flavourful meal features tender beef meatballs made from a blend of premium lean minced beef and our signature herbs and spices. The meatballs are then tossed in a rich, robust tomato sauce made from ripe, juicy tomatoes, slow-cooked with garlic, onions, and herbs. Combined with the firm texture of penne pasta and a sprinkle of grated tasty cheese, this dish is sure to become a family favourite with both young and old.  If you are looking to please a crowd without the hassle of slaving over a hot stove yourself, our meatballs are a convenient option to try.

long_description:
At FroPro, our burritos are proudly made in Australia. Our high protein burritos are packed with high quality, nutrient dense ingredients. Making them the perfect lunch, dinner or filling snack when you are on the go!
  • Quick & Convenient: Cook from frozen in 3 minutes in the microwave.
  • High Protein: Fuel your entire day and stay fuller for longer, FroPro Burritos are packed with high-quality protein wrapped in a high-protein wrap.
  • Low Sugar: FroPro Burritos are low in sugar to provide sustained energy throughout your day.
  • High Health Star Rating: FPFC offers guilt free fried chicken without compromising on flavour.
  • Proudly Australian: Made in Australia with local ingredients, FroPro Burritos provide a delicious and nutritious way to treat yourself better!

We're helping Aussies eat better, one burrito at a time.
Make it Fit, make it FroPro!

- A perfect shareable pack for gatherings or a quick bite at home

long_description:
National Pies are proudly Tassie, proudly different.

There's a few things us Tasmanians hold close to our hearts - our state's natural beauty , quality produce, a love for risque art galleries, and last but not least, and our iconic National Pies.

Yes, we're baked differently down here - but in the best possible ways:

100% AUSSIE CHICKEN

128 LAYERS OF PUFF PASTRY

PASTRY PIONEERS SINCE 1942

100% TASSIE MADE

So heat it up, squirt on some sauce and enjoy the pies we love and are proud to share with the nation!

  • 100% AUSSIE CHICKEN

  • 128 LAYERS OF PUFF PASTRY

  • PASTRY PIONEERS SINCE 1942

  • 100% TASSIE MADE

long_description:
Inspired by the flavours of the Mediterranean, Borg's was born in 1960 from a love of cooking and family.  It began with traditional pastry snacks which continue to be the heart and soul of the brand.  Borg's unique take on the Gozleme is inspired by the flavours of Turkey, but wrapped inside of Borg's famous and delicious flaky home style pastry.  Our Gozleme's are a ready in minutes solution to a meal or snack served as they are or with a squeeze of lemon, a salad or dip.

  • Ready to eat in Minutes

  • No artificial colours of flavours

  • No preservatives

long_description:
National Pies are proudly Tassie, Proudly different.

There's a few things us Tasmanians hold close to our hearts - our state's natural beauty , quality produce, a love for risque art galleries, and last but not least, and our iconic National Pies.

Yes, we're baked differently down here - but in the best possible ways:

100% AUSSIE BEEF

128 LAYERS OF PUFF PASTRY

PASTRY PIONEERS SINCE 1942

100% TASSIE MADE

So heat it up, squirt on some sauce and enjoy the pies we love and are proud to share with the nation!

  • 100% AUSSIE BEEF

  • 128 LAYERS OF PUFF PASTRY

  • PASTRY PIONEERS SINCE 1942

  • 100% TASSIE MADE

long_description:
Coles Kitchen Cheeseburger Bites 200g


  • Juicy beef and pork mince bites
  • Serves 4
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. These Coles Kitchen Cheeseburger Bites feature a delicious blend of juicy beef and pork mince mixed with pickles, ketchup and tangy mustard and filled with an oozy cheese centre then covered in a golden crumb coating. they're crispy, flavourful, and totally snackable. Perfect for no-prep party food or appetisers or as a fun addition to any meal.


With 4 servings Coles Kitchen Cheeseburger Bites are great for sharing and they're made with Australian beef and pork so they're full of flavour with no added hormones.


You can bake Coles Kitchen Cheeseburger Bites from frozen in the oven or air fryer in just 12 minutes until they're golden brown and ready to devour. Serve with a dipping sauce like mayo or tomato sauce. Delicious on their own they also make great side dishes and fun finger food for parties.
name: Kitchen Cheeseburger Bites

long_description:
Coles Kitchen Beef Lasagne Spring Rolls 240g.


  • Lasagne spring rolls
  • 6 pieces
  • No artificial colours and flavours


Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. These Coles Kitchen Beef Lasagne Spring Rolls take the classic Italian dish made with pasta pieces in a creamy bechamel and rich Bolognese sauce and wrap it up in a crispy spring roll pancake. It's an unexpected combo that's so flavourful and totally irresistible. Perfect for party food or as a fun appetiser to accompany any meal.


With 6 pieces Coles Kitchen Beef Lasagne Spring Rolls are great for sharing and they're with local Australian beef with no added hormones.


You can bake Coles Kitchen Beef Lasagne Spring Rolls from frozen in the oven or air fryer in just 9 minutes until they're crisp and golden brown, ready to be devoured.

Then serve as is, or alongside a simple side salad. Deliciously different and easy to prepare, they'll be a hit at your next event or get-together.

long_description:
Inspired by the flavours of the Mediterranean, Borg's was born in 1960 from a love of cooking and family. It began with traditional pastry snacks which continue to be the heart and soul of the brand. Delicious, flaky homestyle bites that make a quick and simple solution for entertaining, drop ins, hungry mouths or a quick lunch paired with a side dish - yum! Borg's is proud and humbled to have been a part of  Aussie meals for over 60 years.

We work hard to ensure our Triangles are as close to homemade as possible, with light flaky melt in your mouth pastry and delicious fillings. We actively avoid any nasties so you can be confident our products are better for you. Our triangles have no artificial colours or flavours and no preservatives.
  • No artificial colours or flavours

  • No preservatives

  • 100% Aussie grown and milled flour

  • No nasties

  • Easy air fry

long_description:
Fry's Plant Based Soy and Flaxseed Schnitzels are delicious and crunchy with a slightly seeded crumb.
As committed vegetarians, we embarked on a journey to make ethical and sustainable, high protein foods for our own family The food we made in our home kitchen was loved by many of our friends and soon we found ourselves on supermarket shelves. We are grateful to every customer who has chosen Fry's rather than an animal product. We hope we can make your journey to a meat free life a simple and enjoyable one together we can make difference!
  • Plant based

  • Meat free

  • Vegetarian

  • Vegan

  • Schnitzels

ingredients: Green Beans.
long_description:
Birds Eye Baby Beans 825g - a nutritious, all-natural veggie option that makes healthy eating a breeze. Sourced from some of Australia's most pristine growing regions, our baby beans are picked at their prime, lightly blanched, and snap frozen to lock in their natural taste and essential vitamins. With all natural ingredients and a rich source of fibre, these beans are a perfect addition to your daily vegetable servings (remember, 1 serve = cup cooked as per Australian Dietary Guidelines).
Designed for convenience, our easy-to-find stand-up bag is made with 50% recycled plastic and features a handy reseal tape, making it simple to store and use your beans whenever you need them for a quick stir-fry, salad, or side dish.

- All natural ingredients packed with goodness
- Easy-to-find stand-up bag
- Made with 50% recycled plastic and convenient reseal tape

ingredients: Broad Beans.
long_description:
Picked at their peak, Heinz Broad are a convenient ingredient to keep in your freezer. Try adding them to a salad, blended into a dip or cooked into a green risotto. Simply cook Heinz Broad Beans in the microwave or in a pot of boiling water and these veggies are ready to be enjoyed. We love broad beans with sliced spanish onion, crumbled feta and a vinaigrette dressing for a great summer salad, but they're also delicious in pasta dishes or as a side to some barbecued meat.
  • Available all year round

  • Vegetables picked at their peak

  • 6 1/2 serves of veggies per pack. One serve of vegetables = 75g. Nutritionists recommend we eat at least 5 serve of vegetables per day. Aim to eat a variety of vegetables each day

  • Great for salads or pasta dishes

  • Serve as a side with barbecued meat

long_description:
Birds Eye Corn Kernels 825g - a nutritious, all-natural addition to your healthy eating plan. Our corn kernels are sourced from our farms in some of Australia's most pristine growing regions, where they're picked at their prime, lightly blanched, and snap frozen to lock in taste along with the natural vitamins and minerals that nature intended.
Packed in an easy-to-find stand-up bag made with 50% recycled plastic and featuring a convenient reseal tape, these kernels help you enjoy a hassle-free, fresh experience every time. Plus, they're a great source of folate, making them a smart choice for boosting your daily vegetable serves - remember, regularly enjoying 5+ serves per day (1 serve = cup cooked, per Australian Dietary Guidelines) supports your overall good health.

- All Natural Ingredients ensuring pure, authentic flavour
- Eco-friendly, easy-to-use packaging for ultimate convenience

long_description:

- Snap frozen to lock in taste and natural vitamins & minerals

- Crafted for a truly gourmet experience at home

- Quick and easy - just add your chosen protein for a complete meal

ingredients: Spinach.
long_description:
Birds Eye Chopped Spinach 250g - your convenient way to serve up nature's finest greens every day. Our spinach is picked at its prime, when each leaf is at its most vibrant, then lightly blanched and frozen into easy-to-use individual portions. This careful process locks in the natural taste, vitamins, and minerals, ensuring your family enjoys spinach as nature intended.
Whether you're whipping up a nutritious smoothie, a hearty stir-fry, or a fresh side salad, Birds Eye Chopped Spinach makes healthy eating effortless, delicious, and full of flavor.

- Picked at prime for maximum taste and nutrition
- Lightly blanched and frozen to lock in natural vitamins and minerals
- Convenient individual portions for easy, everyday use

An Eye for Good, Birds Eye

description: BIRDS EYE SHANGHAI STIR FRY CARROT BROCCOLI WATER CHESTNUTS CAPSICUM & SUGAR SNAP PEAS MIX 500GRAM
ingredients: Vegetables (100%) (carrot, water chestnuts, broccoli, sugar snap peas, red capsicum).
long_description:
Birds Eye Stir Fry Shanghai 500g - your go-to solution for a vibrant and nutritious meal that makes healthy eating effortless. Our Stir Fry Shanghai Style is a flavorful blend of quality vegetables, including broccoli, carrot, water chestnuts, red capsicum, and sugar snap peas, ensuring every bite is as colorful as it is delicious. Packed with a good source of Vitamin C to support a healthy immune system - and made with no added colours, flavours, or preservatives - this mix elevates your dishes with its natural taste.
Whether you serve it over rice or noodles, Birds Eye Stir Fry Shanghai Style perfectly complements your choice of lean meat. Try coating a lean pork fillet with a touch of Char Sui sauce, cooking it to perfection, slicing it thin, and serving it alongside the heated Shanghai mix and spring onion for a refreshing Chinese salad. This is a fast, convenient, and creative way to whip up a tasty, balanced meal that's sure to impress.

- Good source of Vitamin C for a healthy immune boost
- No added colours, flavours, or preservatives
- Brings vibrant colour and flavour to meals

ingredients: Vegetables (100%) (green beans, broccoli, carrot, onion, capsicum, baby corn).
long_description:
Birds Eye Stir Fry Chinese 850g - a vibrant vegetable medley that brings the rich flavours of Chinese cuisine right to your table. Our vegetables are carefully picked at their prime, lightly blanched, and snap frozen to lock in their natural vitamins and minerals, ensuring the quality and taste you expect, exactly as nature intended. On occasion, when our Australian crops are impacted by factors beyond our control, we work with trusted overseas farmers to guarantee you still receive the very best vegetables. Rest assured, we remain committed to bringing you Australian grown produce as soon as possible.
Remember, plant-based foods are the cornerstone of a healthy eating plan - regularly enjoying 5+ serves of vegetables every day (where 1 serve = cup cooked, per Australian Dietary Guidelines) supports your good health.

- Vegetables picked at their prime, lightly blanched, and snap frozen for maximum flavour and nutrition
- Guaranteed quality through trusted partnerships, with a return to Australian grown produce as soon as possible
- Versatile, easy-to-cook ingredients for creating a delicious Chinese Pork Stir Fry

long_description:
Tonkatsu is a Japanese dish that consists sliced of pork is coated with panko then frying them in oil. Hanabi Pork Katsu is crispy on the outside and delicious and moist on the inside.
Hanabi Pork Katsu with an autentic Japanese flavour is easy to prepare. It can be eaten as a main meal on its own served with shredded cabbage and tonkatsu sauce just like the traditional Japanese style or served on curry rice, cooked with egg omelette or even sandwiched in between sliced bread just like the schnitzel.

The story begins in 1926 with the

opening of a humble fish shop in Perth,

WA. To secure the pick of the catch,

close ties were formed with the best

fishermen. With this know how the

business flourished and the oceans were

crossed to bring you the world's

broadest selection of quality seafood.

Today, it's been made even more

convenient for you to enjoy premium

seafood as KB's have prepared it for you

in a variety of delicious ways. KB's

brings the best food from around the

world, to your table.

Treat yourself to the delicious and creamy indulgence of authentic EAZII Mini Egg Custard Buns. These soft, pillowy buns are filled with a smooth and rich egg custard, offering a perfect balance of sweetness that melts in your mouth.
Made from high-quality ingredients with no added preservatives and artificial flavours, these buns provide a wholesome and tasty snack. Easy to prepare and ready to enjoy in minutes, they are ideal for breakfast, dessert, or a quick snack at any time of day.
Simply steam them to experience the soft texture and delectable filling. These mini buns are perfect for sharing at family gatherings or indulging in your own sweet moment.

At FroPro, we know theres nothing quite as satisfying as a bowl of dumplings. But we also understand the need for healthier, more nutritious options. Thats why were doing things differently. Our FroPro Protein Dumplings deliver the flavourful, savoury dumpling you love with the added benefit of high-quality protein to keep you fuelled throughout the day.
  • Quick & Convenient: Cook from frozen in a frypan or steamer in less than 15 minutes
  • High Protein: Fuel your entire day and stay fuller for longer. FroPro Protein Dumplings are packed with high-quality protein inside our high-protein wrapper.
  • Health Star Rating: Our dumplings offer a guilt free alternative to traditional dumplings.
  • Versatile Freezer Staple: Add FroPro Dumplings into your favourite soup or noodle dish for a protein packed meal.
  • Proudly Australian: Made in Australia with local ingredients, FroPro Protein Dumplings provide a delicious and nutritious way to treat yourself better!

We're helping Aussies eat better, one dumpling at a time.
Make it Fit, make it FroPro!

long_description: Indulge in the creamy heat of Samyang's Buldak Carbonara Fried Rice! Bringing together the smooth richness of carbonara with Samyang's signature fiery chicken flavour, this fried rice dish is a bold fusion of East meets West. Filled with a savoury blend of rice, veggies and coated in a creamy yet spicy carbonara sauce, it's the perfect choice for those seeking comfort with a kick. Whether pan-fried or microwaved, the Buldak Carbonara Fried Rice adds a mouthwatering twist to your meal!

long_description:
At FroPro, we know theres nothing quite as satisfying as a bowl of dumplings. But we also understand the need for healthier, more nutritious options. Thats why were doing things differently. Our FroPro Protein Dumplings deliver the flavourful, savoury dumpling you love with the added benefit of high-quality protein to keep you fuelled throughout the day.
  • Quick & Convenient: Cook from frozen in a frypan or steamer in less than 15 minutes
  • High Protein: Fuel your entire day and stay fuller for longer. FroPro Protein Dumplings are packed with high-quality protein inside our high-protein wrapper.
  • Health Star Rating: Our dumplings offer a guilt free alternative to traditional dumplings.
  • Versatile Freezer Staple: Add FroPro Dumplings into your favourite soup or noodle dish for a protein packed meal.
  • Proudly Australian: Made in Australia with local ingredients, FroPro Protein Dumplings provide a delicious and nutritious way to treat yourself better!

We're helping Aussies eat better, one dumpling at a time.
Make it Fit, make it FroPro!

description: COLES KITCHEN DICED MELON & PINEAPPLE MIX 600G
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Melon (67%), Pineapple (33%).Ingredients and percentages may vary due to processing and seasonal variability
long_description:
Coles Kitchen Diced Melon and Pineapple Mix 600g.
  • 100% Australian grown
  • Ready to eat
  • 5-star health rating
Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. This Coles Kitchen Diced Melon and Pineapple Mix has been pre-sliced and prepared making it a quick and convenient way to serve delicious fruit alongside your summer desserts or as part of a fruit platter. You can also create the ultimate sweet and savoury brunch board with a spread of croissants, bagels, waffles and mini pastries alongside Coles Kitchen Diced Melon and Pineapple Mix and crispy bacon, tomatoes, cucumber and crumbly fetta. Or why not make fun rainbow fruit skewers with Coles Kitchen Diced Melon and Pineapple Mix threaded onto bamboo skewers along with red grapes, strawberries, baby cucumber and blueberries? Arrange on a large platter alongside a natural yoghurt and honey sauce for dipping for the perfect finger food for parties that's both healthy and delicious.
name: Diced Melon & Pineapple Mix

  • 100% Australian grown

Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. This Coles Fruit Salad Selection has been pre-sliced and prepared making it quick and convenient to serve alongside your summer desserts, or as part of a fruit platter. Coles Fruit Salad Selection contains a range of seasonal fruits and comes with a sachet of passionfruit pulp to mix in just before serving for a hit of tanginess to complement the sweet fruit flavours. You can also create the ultimate sweet and savoury brunch board with a spread of croissants, bagels, waffles and mini pastries along with Coles Fruit Salad Selection and crispy bacon, tomatoes, cucumber and a crumbly fetta. Coles Kitchen Watermelon Fingers 750g

  • 100% Australian grown
  • 5 serves of fruit
  • 5-star health rating

Our Coles Kitchen range is all about making life easier with deliciously simple, home-style food and fresh ingredients. These Coles Kitchen Watermelon Fingers have been pre-sliced into fingers for a convenient way to serve at parties, snacks or as part of a fruit platter. Coles Kitchen Watermelon Fingers are so versatile and can be served simply with a flavoured yoghurt for dipping. Or create a sweet and savoury brunch board with a spread of croissants, bagels, waffles and mini pastries with Coles Kitchen Watermelon Fingers, pineapple, passionfruit and pottles of yoghurt, alongside crispy bacon, tomatoes, cucumber, and crumbled fetta. You can also use Coles Kitchen Watermelon Fingers to make fun rainbow fruit skewers with a colourful medley of strawberries, pineapple, baby cucumber, blueberries and red grapes on bamboo skewers served with natural yoghurt and honey for dipping. Arrange on a platter for the perfect finger food for parties that looks and tastes great.

long_description: Panama passionfruit is a small, oval to round shaped fruit, approximately two to three inches in diameter at maturity. The fruit's skin is smooth, yet dimpled and at peak maturity can be heavily wrinkled. The skin's color varies with hues of dark purple and red. Below the skin is a cottony white peel. The interior seed cavity of Purple passionfruit is filled with edible yellow to green jelly and medium sized black seeds. Its pulp is highly aromatic and has a tropical sweet tart flavor with nuances of pineapple, papaya, mango, citrus and guava.
name: Panama Passionfruit

long_description: White nectarines are slightly sweeter than the yellow flesh varieties.  When ripe, they are soft, when unripe, they are hard and crunchy.

Peaches differ slightly from nectarines in that their skin is lightly fuzzy whereas nectarines are smooth

long_description: The colour of a capsicum is indicative of when it was harvested with the stages of ripeness transcending from green, yellow, orange through to red. All are edible however the colours also indicate the levels of sweetness and as red capsicums are the most mature, they are the sweetest and contain the most Vitamin C. Due to their almost fruity sweet flavour, this is the best to eat fresh or pack in kids lunchboxes. Did you know that capsicums originated in South America and seeds of a certain wild variety date back to 5,000 B.C! Yikes, that's older than us!
name: Yellow Capsicum

long_description: The colour of a capsicum is indicative of when it was harvested with the stages of ripeness transcending from green, yellow, orange through to red. All are edible however the colours also indicate the levels of sweetness and as red capsicums are the most mature, they are the sweetest and contain the most Vitamin C. Due to their almost fruity sweet flavour, this is the best to eat fresh or pack in kids lunchboxes. Did you know that capsicums originated in South America and seeds of a certain wild variety date back to 5,000 B.C! Yikes, thata??s older than us!
name: Australian Baby Capsicums

long_description:
Coles Garlic Bulbs 3 pack


  • 100% Australian grown
  • 3 pack
  • 5-star health rating


Coles Garlic Bulbs come conveniently prepackaged with 3 garlic bulbs. They're 100% Australian grown and available all year round. Garlic is a superstar in the kitchen. As well as offering numerous possible health benefits, Coles Garlic Bulbs have a 5-star health rating and are a staple for cooking most types of cuisine. They're a must for pasta dishes and Chinese food, adding aroma and depth to meals.


Coles Garlic Bulbs can be crushed, chopped, minced, or roasted whole. Cooked carefully, it will get a hint of sweetness that infuses the oil and makes the perfect flavour base for leafy greens and other ingredients. Be sure not to overcook it as garlic burns very easily and imparts a bitter taste. For dishes like salt and pepper tofu, crispy fried garlic is the perfect accompaniment, and roasted garlic cloves make a fantastic spread for crackers and bread rolls.
name: Garlic Prepack

long_description:
Coles Green Beans 375g

  • 100% Australian grown
  • 5-star health rating
  • Serves 4


Coles is committed to supporting Aussie farmers and sourcing locally grown produce whenever possible. Our Coles Green Beans are proudly grown in Western Australia and have a 5-star health rating.


These vibrant green beans are full of essential nutrients and vitamins. Their crunchy texture and slightly sweet flavour complements all types of dishes and works especially well as an accompaniment to baked fish and grilled lamb or vegetarian curries and stirfries.


Use Coles Green Beans to make a salad with pinenuts or sliced almonds, a crumbly goat's cheese, and a squeeze of lemon. While they're most often steamed, Coles Green Beans are delicious when grilled on the barbeque or in a hot pan. Eaten raw, green beans make a morish and healthy snack. Just give them a quick wash then snip off the ends and enjoy with a tasty dipping sauce like tahini or hummus.
name: Green Beans Prepacked

long_description:
Crafted for moments that gather people around the table, our Grower's Selection Roasting Potatoes are the quiet heroes of a perfect roast. Each variety has been carefully chosen for its naturally buttery flesh and velvety texture — potatoes that blush gold in the oven and crisp into a delicate, irresistible crunch.
As they roast, they transform — crisp and crackling on the outside, soft and cloud-like within. Every bite delivers that satisfying contrast: a golden shell giving way to warm, fluffy comfort. Made for long lunches, celebratory dinners, and everything in between, they promise a roast worth lingering over.
name: Roasting Potatoes

long_description:
Some dishes are pure comfort — and these potatoes were born for it. Our Grower's Selection Mashing Potatoes are specially selected for their naturally smooth texture and indulgent creaminess. When cooked, they surrender effortlessly into a mash that is silk-soft, light, and luxuriously rich.
Each spoonful melts gently on the tongue, delivering warmth and comfort in its most elegant form. No guesswork, no compromise — just consistently dreamy, velvety mash that turns everyday meals into something quietly unforgettable.
name: Mashing Potatoes

description: COLES BUNCH CHRYSANTHEMUM WHITE CFC:.:1 EACH
long_description:
Elegant White Chrysanthemums – timeless beauty for every occasion
Radiant and pure, white chrysanthemums bring a touch of grace and serenity to any setting. Their delicate petals and crisp white blooms symbolize honesty, loyalty, and lasting friendship, making them a thoughtful choice for gifting or creating sophisticated floral displays.
Perfect for brightening your home, enhancing table décor, or celebrating special moments, these blooms add a fresh, uplifting charm wherever they're placed

Flower Care
  • Unwrap flowers and place in a clean vase with water and flower food
  • Cut 2cm off all stems on an angle
  • Remove all leaves below water level
  • Top up with water regularly
  • Remove yellowing leaves or wilted flowers to prolong vase life
name: Bunch Chrysanthemum White

Perfect for gifting, celebrating milestones, or simply brightening someone's day, this arrangement speaks the language of care, beauty, and thoughtful detail.
name: Arrangement Gift Box
